segment.source: A static volume-pricing table with one row per quantity tier — optional tier label, an up-to quantity paired with a configurable unit such as users or API calls, and the price per unit — introduced by an eyebrow, headline, and rich-text description. Use it for: graduated or volume price lists, per-seat and usage rate schedules, quantity-discount tables. Prefer 'Pricing Slider' for an interactive tier picker; use 'Usage-Based Pricing' for per-unit rate cards without quantity brackets.
